relationship.approval: Explicit human-authorized decision permitting future planning when approved.
relationship.implementation_plan: Replay-visible bounded plan for future implementation work.
relationship.execution_request: Future governed request required before implementation execution.
relationship.actual_code_change: Future implementation output allowed only after governed execution.

constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance may contribute plan text but remains non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates approved evidence and records the planning boundary.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not planning or implementation authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Implementation plan evidence must be append-only and reconstructable.

known_limits: Improvement Implementation Planning Runtime is not implemented.
Execution request creation from implementation plans is not implemented.
Actual code implementation is not implemented.
Implementation plans do not create execution requests, mutate code, or self-apply changes.
